posts.headline: US monitoring closely as Iraqi political situation runs into PM-deadline morning
posts.summary: AMrym reports overnight Washington-side signaling that the US is closely watching the final hours of the PM nomination as Iraqi blocs head into the constitutional cutoff. Translated from Arabic.

posts.headline: Late-night Coordination Framework principals' meeting still running ahead of the deadline
posts.summary: AMrym describes Iraqi senior figures pulling overnight sessions on the PM file, with Awadi and Badry the names being actively bargained as the Sunday deadline approaches. Translated from Arabic.

posts.headline: Trump evacuated from White House Correspondents' Dinner after armed suspect breach attempt
posts.summary: AMrym reports the WHCD security incident as it broke, citing Trump being rushed off stage by Secret Service after an armed suspect attempted to enter the ballroom. Translated from Arabic.

posts.headline: Fox News says Trump returning to dinner after WHCD breach incident
posts.summary: AMrym relays Fox News reporting that Trump intended to return to the dinner once the suspect was contained, marking the incident as not an active threat. Translated from Arabic.

posts.headline: WHCD suspect identified as Cole Thomas Allen, 31, of California
posts.summary: AMrym carries US media identification of the WHCD suspect as Cole Thomas Allen, 31, taken into custody after attempting to enter the dinner with multiple weapons. Translated from Arabic.

posts.headline: Source inside Coordination Framework says Abadi will not enter the PM contest
posts.summary: AMrym cites a Coordination Framework source confirming Haider al-Abadi has formally pulled himself from any final-day PM contention, narrowing the active slate to two names. Translated from Arabic.

posts.headline: Sheikh Hammam Hammoudi voices frustration over government-formation delays
posts.summary: AMrym reports Sheikh Hammam Hammoudi expressing impatience with how long the PM bargaining has run, framing the failure to converge on a candidate as undermining the bloc's credibility. Translated from Arabic.

posts.headline: KurdistanWatch frames the KRG attack toll inside the full February 28 onward war window
posts.summary: KurdistanWatch puts the cumulative drone-and-missile activity inside the Kurdistan Region against the full duration of the US-Israel-Iran war from its February 28 outbreak, underlining the scale of the security cost the region has absorbed.

posts.headline: Bessent comments on the IRGC's adapted force-projection workarounds inside the Hormuz blockade
posts.summary: Bachar el Halabi retweets Treasury Secretary Bessent's note that the IRGC has been forced to invent new tactical workarounds under sustained US economic pressure, signal-boosting the Treasury narrative on the campaign's effects.

posts.headline: Trump phones Fox News reporter directly on Iran posture, retweeted by Halabi
posts.summary: Bachar el Halabi signal-boosts Aishah Hasnie's report that Trump rang her directly to walk through the current US-Iran posture, underscoring Halabi's read that Washington is publicly framing the campaign in real time.
